name: telegram-permission-alert
description: Send Telegram alerts when Claude Code shows a permission dialog, so you can come back and approve blocked work quickly.

CC_TELEGRAM_ALERT_BOT_TOKEN.description: Telegram bot token used only by this Claude Code alert plugin

CC_TELEGRAM_ALERT_CHAT_ID.description: Telegram chat ID that receives Claude Code permission alerts

CC_TELEGRAM_ALERT_PREFIX.description: Optional message prefix for Claude Code Telegram alerts

CC_TELEGRAM_ALERT_NOTIFY_ON.description: Notification mode label for Claude Code Telegram alert docs and troubleshooting
